allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Price:'', d.get\(''current_price''\), ''| Change:'', d.get\(''change_pct''\), ''%''\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f[''label''], f[''predicted_price'']\) for f in d.get\(''forecasts'',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''available:'', d.get\(''available''\)\); [print\(f""  {i[''institution'']}: {i.get\(''target'',''?''\)} \({i[''stance'']}\)""\) for i in d.get\(''institutions'',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''available:'', d.get\(''available''\)\); err=d.get\(''error''\); err and print\(''error:'', err[:100]\); [print\(f""  {i[''institution'']}: {i.get\(''target'',''?''\)} \({i[''stance'']}\)""\) for i in d.get\(''institutions'',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ai=d.get\(''ai_analysis'',{}\); print\(''AI available:'', ai.get\(''available''\)\); print\(''AI error:'', ai.get\(''error''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''available:'', d.get\(''available''\)\); err=d.get\(''error''\); err and print\(''error:'', err[:80]\); [print\(f""  {i[''institution'']}: {i.get\(''target'',''?''\)} \({i[''stance'']}\)""\) for i in d.get\(''institutions'',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ai=d.get\(''ai_analysis'',{}\); print\(''AI available:'', ai.get\(''available''\)\); print\(''Sentiment:'', ai.get\(''sentiment''\)\); print\(''Analysis preview:'', \(ai.get\(''analysis''\) or ''''\)[:150]\)")
